name: CPI Computer Peripherals International
summary: CPI Computer Peripherals International provides IT products and services in Greece. The company offers printers for business applications; barcode/RF-ID printers and scanners, and hand-held portables; scanners and digitization products; surveillance and security products; projectors and specialized products for the education sector; POS terminals and peripherals for tourism, and food and retail businesses; and interactive systems. It also provides CPI product technical support, digitization and document management, and print management services, as well as install, move, add, and change services for computer equipment; technical support services for third-party manufacturers; and custom, consultation, and infrastructure services. The company was founded in 1990 and is based in Athens, Greece.
